{"parentUuid":"7ba3ffe3-c038-4743-9c22-c66ebd312009","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HriPvmRuSn39K19WUyrNwR","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t// lib/features/explore/scene_view.dart\n2\t// Wave 1 — SceneView: Layton-style explorable painted scene.\n3\t//\n4\t// A Stack of parallax background layers (Transform shifts on drag) with\n5\t// Positioned tappable hotspot targets overlaid. On tap:\n6\t//   - NPC: plays clue audio (best-effort) + shows a 「？」bubble. Tapping the\n7\t//     bubble navigates to NazoScreen. On correct, the NPC portrait\n8\t//     AnimatedCrossFades from grey→color (the restoration payoff).\n9\t//   - Coin: plays a coin SFX, adds the coin to HintCoinService, vanishes.\n10\t//\n11\t// NO dart:io. NO Firebase. Image.asset always has errorBuilder → dq gradient.\n12\t// Firebase uid must NOT be used here (see test constraint).\n13\t\n14\timport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\n15\t\n16\timport '../../core/audio/audio_cue_service.dart';\n17\timport '../../core/gamification/hint_coin_service.dart';\n18\timport '../../core/sound/sound_service.dart';\n19\timport '../quest/ui/dq_ui.dart';\n20\timport 'hotspot.dart';\n21\timport 'nazo_screen.dart';\n22\t\n23\texport 'hotspot.dart' show kTown5Scene, SceneDef;\n24\t\n25\tclass SceneView extends StatefulWidget {\n26\t  final SceneDef scene;\n27\t\n28\t  /// The 英検 level string for this scene (drives ピカラット + hint text).\n29\t  final String eikenLevel;\n30\t\n31\t  const SceneView({\n32\t    super.key,\n33\t    required this.scene,\n34\t    this.eikenLevel = '5',\n35\t  });\n36\t\n37\t  @override\n38\t  State<SceneView> createState() => _SceneViewState();\n39\t}\n40\t\n41\tclass _SceneViewState extends State<SceneView> {\n42\t  // ── State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n43\t\n44\t  // NPC solve state: hotspot index → solved bool\n45\t  final Map<int, bool> _solved = {};\n46\t\n47\t  // Coin found state: hotspot index → found bool\n48\t  final Map<int, bool> _coinFound = {};\n49\t\n50\t  // Which NPC index currently shows a 「？」speech-bubble (null = none)\n51\t  int? _bubbleIndex;\n52\t\n53\t  // Coin balance (shown in HUD after collecting)\n54\t  int _coinBalance = 0;\n55\t\n56\t  // Parallax offset driven by pan gesture\n57\t  double _parallaxOffset = 0.0;\n58\t  static const _parallaxMaxShift = 0.04; // fraction of container width\n59\t\n60\t  // Services\n61\t  final _cue = AudioCueService();\n62\t  final _sound = SoundService();\n63\t  late final HintCoinService _coins;\n64\t\n65\t  @override\n66\t  void initState() {\n67\t    super.initState();\n68\t    _coins = HintCoinService();\n69\t    _loadCoinBalance();\n70\t  }\n71\t\n72\t  Future<void> _loadCoinBalance() async {\n73\t    final b = await _coins.balance();\n74\t    if (mounted) setState(() => _coinBalance = b);\n75\t  }\n76\t\n77\t  @override\n78\t  void dispose() {\n79\t    _cue.dispose();\n80\t    super.dispose();\n81\t  }\n82\t\n83\t  // ── Parallax ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n84\t\n85\t  void _onPanUpdate(DragUpdateDetails d) {\n86\t    setState(() {\n87\t      // Drag right → layers drift left (negative shift for near, less for far).\n88\t      _parallaxOffset =\n89\t          (_parallaxOffset + d.delta.dx * 0.0008).clamp(-_parallaxMaxShift, _parallaxMaxShift);\n90\t    });\n91\t  }\n92\t\n93\t  void _onPanEnd(DragEndDetails _) {\n94\t    // Spring back to centre\n95\t    setState(() => _parallaxOffset = 0.0);\n96\t  }\n97\t\n98\t  // ── Hotspot interactions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n99\t\n100\t  void _onHotspotTap(int idx) {\n101\t    final h = widget.scene.hotspots[idx];\n102\t    if (h.kind == HotspotKind.coin) {\n103\t      _collectCoin(idx, h);\n104\t    } else if (h.kind == HotspotKind.npc) {\n105\t      _tapNpc(idx, h);\n106\t    }\n107\t  }\n108\t\n109\t  void _tapNpc(int idx, Hotspot h) {\n110\t    if (_solved[idx] == true) return; // already solved — no re-trigger\n111\t    // Play clue audio best-effort\n112\t    if (h.clueLineJa != null) {\n113\t      // Audio asset not available yet (generated separately); best-effort no-op.\n114\t      _cue.play(null);\n115\t    }\n116\t    setState(() {\n117\t      _bubbleIndex = (_bubbleIndex == idx) ? null : idx;\n118\t    });\n119\t  }\n120\t\n121\t  void _onBubbleTap(int idx) {\n122\t    final h = widget.scene.hotspots[idx];\n123\t    if (h.step == null) return;\n124\t    setState(() => _bubbleIndex = null);\n125\t    _openNazo(idx, h);\n126\t  }\n127\t\n128\t  Future<void> _openNazo(int idx, Hotspot h) async {\n129\t    final result = await Navigator.of(context).push<NazoResult>(\n130\t      MaterialPageRoute(\n131\t        builder: (_) => NazoScreen(\n132\t          hotspot: h,\n133\t          eikenLevel: widget.eikenLevel,\n134\t          hintCoinService: _coins,\n135\t        ),\n136\t      ),\n137\t    );\n138\t    if (!mounted) return;\n139\t    if (result != null && result.solved) {\n140\t      setState(() => _solved[idx] = true);\n141\t      _sound.playCorrect();\n142\t    }\n143\t  }\n144\t\n145\t  Future<void> _collectCoin(int idx, Hotspot h) async {\n146\t    if (_coinFound[idx] == true) return;\n147\t    setState(() => _coinFound[idx] = true);\n148\t    _sound.playXpGain();\n149\t    final newBalance = await _coins.addCoin(h.coinValue);\n150\t    if (mounted) setState(() => _coinBalance = newBalance);\n151\t  }\n152\t\n153\t  // ── Build ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n154\t\n155\t  @override\n156\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n157\t    return Scaffold(\n158\t      backgroundColor: dqNight0,\n159\t      body: SafeArea(\n160\t        child: Column(\n161\t          children: [\n162\t            _header(),\n163\t            Expanded(child: _sceneStack()),\n164\t          ],\n165\t        ),\n166\t      ),\n167\t    );\n168\t  }\n169\t\n170\t  Widget _header() => Padding(\n171\t        padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(8, 8, 8, 4),\n172\t        child: Row(\n173\t          children: [\n174\t            IconButton(\n175\t              onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).maybePop(),\n176\t              icon: const Icon(Icons.arrow_back, color: dqInk),\n177\t            ),\n178\t            Expanded(\n179\t              child: Text(\n180\t                widget.scene.titleJa,\n181\t                textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n182\t                style: dqText(size: 16, w: FontWeight.w800, color: dqGold),\n183\t              ),\n184\t            ),\n185\t            // Coin HUD\n186\t            Padding(\n187\t              padding: const EdgeInsets.only(right: 8),\n188\t              child: Row(\n189\t                mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n190\t                children: [\n191\t                  const Text('✦', style: TextStyle(color: Color(0xFFFFD700), fontSize: 16)),\n192\t                  const SizedBox(width: 3),\n193\t                  Text('$_coinBalance', style: dqText(size: 14, color: dqGold)),\n194\t                ],\n195\t              ),\n196\t            ),\n197\t          ],\n198\t        ),\n199\t      );\n200\t\n201\t  Widget _sceneStack() {\n202\t    return GestureDetector(\n203\t      onPanUpdate: _onPanUpdate,\n204\t      onPanEnd: _onPanEnd,\n205\t      child: LayoutBuilder(\n206\t        builder: (context, constraints) {\n207\t          final w = constraints.maxWidth;\n208\t          final h = constraints.maxHeight;\n209\t          return Stack(\n210\t            clipBehavior: Clip.hardEdge,\n211\t            children: [\n212\t              // ── Background / parallax layers ──────────────────────────────\n213\t              ..._buildParallaxLayers(w, h),\n214\t\n215\t              // ── Dark vignette overlay for legibility ──────────────────────\n216\t              Positioned.fill(\n217\t                child: DecoratedBox(\n218\t                  decoration: BoxDecoration(\n219\t                    gradient: LinearGradient(\n220\t                      begin: Alignment.topCenter,\n221\t                      end: Alignment.bottomCenter,\n222\t                      colors: [\n223\t                        Colors.black.withAlpha(80),\n224\t                        Colors.transparent,\n225\t                        Colors.black.withAlpha(130),\n226\t                      ],\n227\t                      stops: const [0.0, 0.5, 1.0],\n228\t                    ),\n229\t                  ),\n230\t                ),\n231\t              ),\n232\t\n233\t              // ── Hotspot overlay ───────────────────────────────────────────\n234\t              for (var i = 0; i < widget.scene.hotspots.length; i++)\n235\t                _hotspotWidget(i, w, h),\n236\t            ],\n237\t          );\n238\t        },\n239\t      ),\n240\t    );\n241\t  }\n242\t\n243\t  List<Widget> _buildParallaxLayers(double w, double h) {\n244\t    final layers = widget.scene.parallaxLayers;\n245\t    if (layers.isEmpty) {\n246\t      // Single background layer, no parallax.\n247\t      return [_backgroundImage(widget.scene.backgroundAsset, 0, w)];\n248\t    }\n249\t    // Multiple layers: far layer shifts least, near layer shifts most.\n250\t    return [\n251\t      for (var i = 0; i < layers.length; i++)\n252\t        _backgroundImage(layers[i], i / (layers.length - 1), w),\n253\t    ];\n254\t  }\n255\t\n256\t  /// Render one parallax layer. [depthFraction] 0.0 = far (least movement),\n257\t  /// 1.0 = near (most movement). Shift is applied via Transform.translate.\n258\t  Widget _backgroundImage(String asset, double depthFraction, double w) {\n259\t    final shift = _parallaxOffset * w * depthFraction * 3;\n260\t    return Positioned.fill(\n261\t      child: Transform.translate(\n262\t        offset: Offset(shift, 0),\n263\t        child: Image.asset(\n264\t          asset,\n265\t          fit: BoxFit.cover,\n266\t          errorBuilder: (_, __, ___) => _gradientFallback(),\n267\t        ),\n268\t      ),\n269\t    );\n270\t  }\n271\t\n272\t  Widget _gradientFallback() => const DecoratedBox(\n273\t        decoration: BoxDecoration(\n274\t          gradient: LinearGradient(\n275\t            begin: Alignment.topCenter,\n276\t            end: Alignment.bottomCenter,\n277\t            colors: [dqNight0, dqNight1, dqNight0],\n278\t          ),\n279\t        ),\n280\t      );\n281\t\n282\t  // ── Hotspot widget ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n283\t\n284\t  Widget _hotspotWidget(int idx, double w, double h) {\n285\t    final hotspot = widget.scene.hotspots[idx];\n286\t    final isSolved = _solved[idx] == true;\n287\t    final isCoinFound = _coinFound[idx] == true;\n288\t\n289\t    if (hotspot.kind == HotspotKind.coin && isCoinFound) {\n290\t      return const SizedBox.shrink(); // Vanished after collection\n291\t    }\n292\t\n293\t    // Position: Alignment → pixel offset.\n294\t    final cx = (hotspot.pos.x + 1) / 2 * w;\n295\t    final cy = (hotspot.pos.y + 1) / 2 * h;\n296\t    final size = hotspot.size * w.clamp(100.0, 480.0);\n297\t\n298\t    return Positioned(\n299\t      left: cx - size / 2,\n300\t      top: cy - size / 2,\n301\t      width: size,\n302\t      height: size,\n303\t      child: GestureDetector(\n304\t        onTap: () => _onHotspotTap(idx),\n305\t        child: Stack(\n306\t          clipBehavior: Clip.none,\n307\t          alignment: Alignment.center,\n308\t          children: [\n309\t            // The hotspot target itself\n310\t            hotspot.kind == HotspotKind.coin\n311\t                ? _coinTarget(size)\n312\t                : _npcTarget(idx, hotspot, isSolved, size),\n313\t\n314\t            // 「？」Speech bubble above the NPC (only when tapped)\n315\t            if (hotspot.kind == HotspotKind.npc && _bubbleIndex == idx)\n316\t              Positioned(\n317\t                bottom: size + 4,\n318\t                child: GestureDetector(\n319\t                  onTap: () => _onBubbleTap(idx),\n320\t                  child: _speechBubble(hotspot.clueLineJa),\n321\t                ),\n322\t              ),\n323\t          ],\n324\t        ),\n325\t      ),\n326\t    );\n327\t  }\n328\t\n329\t  Widget _coinTarget(double size) {\n330\t    return TweenAnimationBuilder<double>(\n331\t      tween: Tween(begin: 0.8, end: 1.0),\n332\t      duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 900),\n333\t      curve: Curves.easeInOut,\n334\t      builder: (_, t, __) => Transform.scale(\n335\t        scale: t,\n336\t        child: Container(\n337\t          width: size,\n338\t          height: size,\n339\t          decoration: BoxDecoration(\n340\t            shape: BoxShape.circle,\n341\t            color: const Color(0xFF2A1C00).withAlpha(180),\n342\t            border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFFFD700), width: 2),\n343\t            boxShadow: [\n344\t              BoxShadow(\n345\t                color: const Color(0xFFFFD700).withAlpha(160),\n346\t                blurRadius: 12,\n347\t                spreadRadius: 2,\n348\t              ),\n349\t            ],\n350\t          ),\n351\t          child: const Center(\n352\t            child: Text('✦', style: TextStyle(color: Color(0xFFFFD700), fontSize: 20)),\n353\t          ),\n354\t        ),\n355\t      ),\n356\t    );\n357\t  }\n358\t\n359\t  Widget _npcTarget(int idx, Hotspot hotspot, bool solved, double size) {\n360\t    final grey = hotspot.npcGreyAsset;\n361\t    final color = hotspot.npcColorAsset;\n362\t\n363\t    // If no art exists yet: fallback to emoji/icon portrait\n364\t    if (grey == null && color == null) {\n365\t      return Container(\n366\t        width: size,\n367\t        height: size,\n368\t        decoration: BoxDecoration(\n369\t          shape: BoxShape.circle,\n370\t          color: dqBox.withAlpha(200),\n371\t          border: Border.all(\n372\t            color: solved ? const Color(0xFF8BE08B) : dqGold,\n373\t            width: 2.5,\n374\t          ),\n375\t          boxShadow: [\n376\t            BoxShadow(\n377\t              color: (solved ? const Color(0xFF8BE08B) : dqGold).withAlpha(100),\n378\t              blurRadius: 10,\n379\t            ),\n380\t          ],\n381\t        ),\n382\t        child: Center(\n383\t          child: Text(\n384\t            hotspot.step?.npcEmoji ?? '👤',\n385\t            style: TextStyle(fontSize: size * 0.45),\n386\t          ),\n387\t        ),\n388\t      );\n389\t    }\n390\t\n391\t    // Grey→color cross-fade on solve\n392\t    return AnimatedCrossFade(\n393\t      duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 600),\n394\t      crossFadeState: solved ? CrossFadeState.showSecond : CrossFadeState.showFirst,\n395\t      firstChild: _npcPortraitImage(grey ?? '', size),\n396\t      secondChild: _npcPortraitImage(color ?? '', size),\n397\t    );\n398\t  }\n399\t\n400\t  Widget _npcPortraitImage(String asset, double size) {\n401\t    return Container(\n402\t      width: size,\n403\t      height: size,\n404\t      clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,\n405\t      decoration: const BoxDecoration(shape: BoxShape.circle),\n406\t      child: Image.asset(\n407\t        asset,\n408\t        fit: BoxFit.cover,\n409\t        errorBuilder: (_, __, ___) => Container(\n410\t          decoration: BoxDecoration(\n411\t            shape: BoxShape.circle,\n412\t            color: dqBox.withAlpha(200),\n413\t            border: Border.all(color: dqGold, width: 2),\n414\t          ),\n415\t          child: const Center(child: Text('👤', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 28))),\n416\t        ),\n417\t      ),\n418\t    );\n419\t  }\n420\t\n421\t  Widget _speechBubble(String? clueLineJa) {\n422\t    return Container(\n423\t      constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 220),\n424\t      padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 10, 12, 10),\n425\t      decoration: BoxDecoration(\n426\t        color: dqBox.withAlpha(245),\n427\t        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),\n428\t        border: Border.all(color: dqGold, width: 2),\n429\t        boxShadow: const [BoxShadow(color: Colors.black54, blurRadius: 10, offset: Offset(0, 3))],\n430\t      ),\n431\t      child: Column(\n432\t        mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n433\t        children: [\n434\t          if (clueLineJa != null) ...[\n435\t            Text(clueLineJa, style: dqText(size: 12, w: FontWeight.w500, color: dqInk).copyWith(height: 1.5)),\n436\t            const SizedBox(height: 6),\n437\t          ],\n438\t          Row(\n439\t            mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,\n440\t            children: [\n441\t              Container(\n442\t                padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 5),\n443\t                decoration: BoxDecoration(\n444\t                  gradient: const LinearGradient(colors: [dqGold, dqGoldDeep]),\n445\t                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),\n446\t                ),\n447\t                child: Text(\n448\t                  '「？」ナゾをみる',\n449\t                  style: dqText(size: 12, w: FontWeight.w800, color: const Color(0xFF2A1C00)),\n450\t                ),\n451\t              ),\n452\t            ],\n453\t          ),\n454\t        ],\n455\t      ),\n456\t    );\n457\t  }\n458\t}\n459\t"}]},"uuid":"60d1072a-cdf9-434e-bd2e-465add31175a","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:56:50.200Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"7ba3ffe3-c038-4743-9c22-c66ebd312009","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
{"parentUuid":"60d1072a-cdf9-434e-bd2e-465add31175a","isSidechain":true,"agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01LiMuJbkAyR1u9ocJ9e1BzR","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01D5BeNNvK7N52Uy2ubF5DNr","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter/lib/features/exam_practice/pass/cse_model.dart"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6556,"cache_read_input_tokens":34607,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6556,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":5,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbmLJBUPFVMBJ77sy5qZ7","attributionAgent":"general-purpose","type":"assistant","uuid":"5eed91ac-5c84-44cf-9e57-141eba64b302","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:56:50.685Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
{"parentUuid":"5eed91ac-5c84-44cf-9e57-141eba64b302","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01D5BeNNvK7N52Uy2ubF5DNr","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t// lib/features/exam_practice/pass/cse_model.dart\n2\t// A-KEN Quest — Per-skill CSE estimator and 合格率 predictor.\n3\t//\n4\t// SPEC SOURCE: docs/design/EIKEN-MASTERY-AND-GAPS-2026-06-06.json\n5\t//   (verified eiken.or.jp + 旺文社英語の友/ESLclub, accessed 2026-06-06)\n6\t//\n7\t// CSE SCORING — POST-2024 REFORM (技能均等配分):\n8\t//   KEY RULE: Each skill (Reading/Listening/Writing/Speaking) is weighted EQUALLY\n9\t//   within a grade's total CSE. One weak skill fails you even if others are perfect.\n10\t//\n11\t//   Grade  | 一次満点 | 一次合格 | 技能満点 (per applicable skill) | 技能\n12\t//   -------|---------|---------|--------------------------------|-----\n13\t//   5級    |   850   |   419   | R:425(100%)    L:425(100%)      | R, L\n14\t//   4級    |  1000   |   622   | R:500(100%)    L:500(100%)      | R, L\n15\t//   3級    |  1650   |  1103   | R:550  W:550   L:550           | R, W, L\n16\t//   準2級  |  1980   |  1322   | R:660  W:660   L:660           | R, W, L\n17\t//   2級    |  2600   |  1520   | R:650  W:650   L:650  [+S 650] | R, W, L (一次)\n18\t//   準1級  |  3000   |  1792   | R:750  W:750   L:750  [+S 750] | R, W, L (一次)\n19\t//\n20\t// NOTE: 一次試験 covers Reading + Writing (where applicable) + Listening.\n21\t//       Speaking (二次) is a SEPARATE exam stage; this model covers 一次 only.\n22\t//\n23\t// 5級/4級 have NO writing section; skill-equal split is R/L only (each 50%).\n24\t// 3級/準2級/2級/準1級 have R+W+L; each ~33.3% of 一次 満点.\n25\t//\n26\t// 技能満点 values are derived:  skillMax = floorToInt(一次満点 / skillCount)\n27\t// (fractional remainders assigned to the last skill via [_residual]).\n28\t//\n29\t// 合格率 is a readiness estimate, not a probabilistic model.\n30\t// Algorithm: sum estimated CSE scores across skills → compare to 合格基準スコア.\n31\t// readinessPct = clamp(estimatedTotal / passingScore * 100, 0, 100).\n32\t// This is appropriate for a child-facing \"how close am I\" meter.\n33\t//\n34\t// NO dart:io. No Firebase. No network. Pure-Dart computation only (R4).\n35\t\n36\t/// Which skills a grade tests in the 一次 (written) exam.\n37\tenum EikenSkill {\n38\t  reading,\n39\t  writing,\n40\t  listening,\n41\t}\n42\t\n43\t/// Accuracy data for a single skill (0.0–1.0).\n44\t/// [attempted] = whether the learner has any data for this skill.\n45\t/// When [attempted] is false the skill is treated as unknown (0 accuracy)\n46\t/// and [estimatedCse] returns 0, which correctly penalises unknown skills\n47\t/// in the readiness calculation.\n48\tclass SkillAccuracy {\n49\t  final EikenSkill skill;\n50\t\n51\t  /// Fraction of items answered correctly (0.0–1.0).\n52\t  final double accuracy;\n53\t\n54\t  /// Number of items answered so far; 0 = no data.\n55\t  final int itemsAttempted;\n56\t\n57\t  const SkillAccuracy({\n58\t    required this.skill,\n59\t    required this.accuracy,\n60\t    this.itemsAttempted = 0,\n61\t  });\n62\t\n63\t  bool get attempted => itemsAttempted > 0;\n64\t}\n65\t\n66\t/// Per-skill CSE estimate + the whole-exam aggregate.\n67\tclass CseEstimate {\n68\t  /// The 英検 grade key (e.g. '5', '4', '3', 'pre2', '2', 'pre1').\n69\t  final String grade;\n70\t\n71\t  /// Per-skill breakdown: {EikenSkill → estimated CSE score for that skill}.\n72\t  final Map<EikenSkill, int> skillScores;\n73\t\n74\t  /// Sum of all skill scores (= estimated total 一次 CSE).\n75\t  final int totalScore;\n76\t\n77\t  /// The grade's 一次 合格基準スコア (passing threshold).\n78\t  final int passingScore;\n79\t\n80\t  /// The grade's 一次 満点 (maximum possible CSE).\n81\t  final int maxScore;\n82\t\n83\t  /// Readiness percentage: how close the learner is to passing (0–100).\n84\t  /// Formula: clamp(totalScore / passingScore × 100, 0, 100).\n85\t  /// When readinessPct >= 100 the learner is predicted to pass.\n86\t  final double readinessPct;\n87\t\n88\t  /// The skill with the lowest estimated CSE score (relative to its max).\n89\t  /// This is the \"weakest skill\" the UI highlights as the blocking factor.\n90\t  /// null when no skills have data.\n91\t  final EikenSkill? limitingSkill;\n92\t\n93\t  /// Number of CSE points still needed to reach the passing threshold.\n94\t  /// 0 when already at or above the passing score.\n95\t  final int pointsNeeded;\n96\t\n97\t  const CseEstimate({\n98\t    required this.grade,\n99\t    required this.skillScores,\n100\t    required this.totalScore,\n101\t    required this.passingScore,\n102\t    required this.maxScore,\n103\t    required this.readinessPct,\n104\t    required this.limitingSkill,\n105\t    required this.pointsNeeded,\n106\t  });\n107\t\n108\t  /// True when readinessPct >= 100 (predicted pass).\n109\t  bool get isPredictedPass => readinessPct >= 100.0;\n110\t}\n111\t\n112\t// ── Grade spec table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n113\t\n114\t/// Per-grade spec: which skills are in the 一次, their max CSE, and thresholds.\n115\tclass _GradeSpec {\n116\t  final String grade;\n117\t  final List<EikenSkill> skills;\n118\t  final int firstPassScore; // 一次合格基準\n119\t  final int firstMaxScore; // 一次満点\n120\t\n121\t  const _GradeSpec({\n122\t    required this.grade,\n123\t    required this.skills,\n124\t    required this.firstPassScore,\n125\t    required this.firstMaxScore,\n126\t  });\n127\t\n128\t  /// Each skill's share of the 一次 満点 (技能均等配分).\n129\t  /// skillMax(i) = firstMaxScore ÷ skills.length, rounded.\n130\t  /// The last skill absorbs any rounding residual.\n131\t  Map<EikenSkill, int> get skillMaxScores {\n132\t    final n = skills.length;\n133\t    final base = firstMaxScore ~/ n;\n134\t    final residual = firstMaxScore - base * n;\n135\t    final out = <EikenSkill, int>{};\n136\t    for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n137\t      out[skills[i]] = i == n - 1 ? base + residual : base;\n138\t    }\n139\t    return out;\n140\t  }\n141\t}\n142\t\n143\t/// Verified CSE data — source: EIKEN-MASTERY-AND-GAPS-2026-06-06.json\n144\t/// (eiken.or.jp + 旺文社英語の友, accessed 2026-06-06).\n145\tconst Map<String, _GradeSpec> _kGradeSpecs = {\n146\t  '5': _GradeSpec(\n147\t    grade: '5',\n148\t    skills: [EikenSkill.reading, EikenSkill.listening],\n149\t    firstPassScore: 419,\n150\t    firstMaxScore: 850,\n151\t  ),\n152\t  '4': _GradeSpec(\n153\t    grade: '4',\n154\t    skills: [EikenSkill.reading, EikenSkill.listening],\n155\t    firstPassScore: 622,\n156\t    firstMaxScore: 1000,\n157\t  ),\n158\t  '3': _GradeSpec(\n159\t    grade: '3',\n160\t    skills: [EikenSkill.reading, EikenSkill.writing, EikenSkill.listening],\n161\t    firstPassScore: 1103,\n162\t    firstMaxScore: 1650,\n163\t  ),\n164\t  'pre2': _GradeSpec(\n165\t    grade: 'pre2',\n166\t    skills: [EikenSkill.reading, EikenSkill.writing, EikenSkill.listening],\n167\t    firstPassScore: 1322,\n168\t    firstMaxScore: 1980,\n169\t  ),\n170\t  '2': _GradeSpec(\n171\t    grade: '2',\n172\t    skills: [EikenSkill.reading, EikenSkill.writing, EikenSkill.listening],\n173\t    firstPassScore: 1520,\n174\t    firstMaxScore: 2600,\n175\t  ),\n176\t  'pre1': _GradeSpec(\n177\t    grade: 'pre1',\n178\t    skills: [EikenSkill.reading, EikenSkill.writing, EikenSkill.listening],\n179\t    firstPassScore: 1792,\n180\t    firstMaxScore: 3000,\n181\t  ),\n182\t};\n183\t\n184\t// ── CseEstimator ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n185\t\n186\t/// Converts per-skill accuracy data into a CSE estimate + 合格率 prediction.\n187\t///\n188\t/// Usage:\n189\t/// ```dart\n190\t/// final estimate = CseEstimator.estimate(\n191\t///   grade: '2',\n192\t///   accuracies: [\n193\t///     SkillAccuracy(skill: EikenSkill.reading,   accuracy: 0.80, itemsAttempted: 31),\n194\t///     SkillAccuracy(skill: EikenSkill.writing,   accuracy: 0.60, itemsAttempted: 2),\n195\t///     SkillAccuracy(skill: EikenSkill.listening, accuracy: 0.70, itemsAttempted: 30),\n196\t///   ],\n197\t/// );\n198\t/// print(estimate.readinessPct);   // e.g. 87.3\n199\t/// print(estimate.limitingSkill);  // EikenSkill.writing\n200\t/// ```\n201\tclass CseEstimator {\n202\t  CseEstimator._();\n203\t\n204\t  /// Returns null when [grade] is not in the spec table.\n205\t  static CseEstimate? estimate({\n206\t    required String grade,\n207\t    required List<SkillAccuracy> accuracies,\n208\t  }) {\n209\t    final spec = _kGradeSpecs[grade];\n210\t    if (spec == null) return null;\n211\t\n212\t    final maxScores = spec.skillMaxScores;\n213\t    final skillScores = <EikenSkill, int>{};\n214\t\n215\t    // Build an accuracy lookup (unrecognised skills are ignored).\n216\t    final accMap = {for (final a in accuracies) a.skill: a};\n217\t\n218\t    for (final skill in spec.skills) {\n219\t      final acc = accMap[skill];\n220\t      final max = maxScores[skill]!;\n221\t      if (acc == null || !acc.attempted) {\n222\t        // No data for this skill → estimate 0 (conservative/safe).\n223\t        skillScores[skill] = 0;\n224\t      } else {\n225\t        // Clamp accuracy to [0,1] defensively.\n226\t        final a = acc.accuracy.clamp(0.0, 1.0);\n227\t        skillScores[skill] = (a * max).round();\n228\t      }\n229\t    }\n230\t\n231\t    final totalScore = skillScores.values.fold(0, (s, v) => s + v);\n232\t\n233\t    // readinessPct: how far toward the passing threshold. Cap at 100.\n234\t    final readinessPct =\n235\t        (totalScore / spec.firstPassScore * 100.0).clamp(0.0, 100.0);\n236\t\n237\t    final pointsNeeded =\n238\t        (spec.firstPassScore - totalScore).clamp(0, spec.firstMaxScore);\n239\t\n240\t    // Limiting skill = the skill with the LOWEST score relative to its own max\n241\t    // (ratio = score / skillMax). This correctly identifies the bottleneck even\n242\t    // when skill maxes differ slightly due to rounding.\n243\t    EikenSkill? limiting;\n244\t    double worstRatio = double.infinity;\n245\t    for (final skill in spec.skills) {\n246\t      final score = skillScores[skill]!;\n247\t      final max = maxScores[skill]!;\n248\t      final ratio = max == 0 ? 0.0 : score / max;\n249\t      if (ratio < worstRatio) {\n250\t        worstRatio = ratio;\n251\t        limiting = skill;\n252\t      }\n253\t    }\n254\t\n255\t    return CseEstimate(\n256\t      grade: grade,\n257\t      skillScores: Map.unmodifiable(skillScores),\n258\t      totalScore: totalScore,\n259\t      passingScore: spec.firstPassScore,\n260\t      maxScore: spec.firstMaxScore,\n261\t      readinessPct: readinessPct,\n262\t      limitingSkill: limiting,\n263\t      pointsNeeded: pointsNeeded,\n264\t    );\n265\t  }\n266\t\n267\t  /// Returns the skill-max scores for a grade without needing a full estimate.\n268\t  /// Useful for rendering the per-skill bar max in [PassMeterScreen].\n269\t  /// Returns null for unknown grades.\n270\t  static Map<EikenSkill, int>? skillMaxScores(String grade) =>\n271\t      _kGradeSpecs[grade]?.skillMaxScores;\n272\t\n273\t  /// Returns the 一次 skills for a grade.\n274\t  static List<EikenSkill>? skillsForGrade(String grade) =>\n275\t      _kGradeSpecs[grade]?.skills;\n276\t\n277\t  /// Human-readable Japanese label for a skill (child-facing).\n278\t  static String skillLabelJa(EikenSkill skill) {\n279\t    switch (skill) {\n280\t      case EikenSkill.reading:\n281\t        return 'リーディング';\n282\t      case EikenSkill.writing:\n283\t        return 'ライティング';\n284\t      case EikenSkill.listening:\n285\t        return 'リスニング';\n286\t    }\n287\t  }\n288\t\n289\t  /// Short English label for a skill (bilingual UI per CEO directive).\n290\t  static String skillLabelEn(EikenSkill skill) {\n291\t    switch (skill) {\n292\t      case EikenSkill.reading:\n293\t        return 'Reading';\n294\t      case EikenSkill.writing:\n295\t        return 'Writing';\n296\t      case EikenSkill.listening:\n297\t        return 'Listening';\n298\t    }\n299\t  }\n300\t}\n301\t"}]},"uuid":"e52e7ef7-8d9a-4798-b97b-a000db9ad992","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:56:50.700Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"5eed91ac-5c84-44cf-9e57-141eba64b302","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
{"parentUuid":"e52e7ef7-8d9a-4798-b97b-a000db9ad992","isSidechain":true,"agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_019rPVjpwQLogZLLDXuMJKgs","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I have strong evidence on the pass-meter math. The CSE model has a serious flaw: `readinessPct = totalScore / passingScore * 100`. The passmeter screenshot shows 100% / \"合格けん！\" with Reading 81%, Writing 60%, Listening 74%. Let me verify: the meter says you pass even though Writing is only 60% — but the constitution and the model's own header say \"One weak skill fails you even if others are perfect.\" The aggregate-vs-passing math hides exactly that. Let me check the pass_meter_screen to see what data feeds it (real vs hardcoded demo) and how the speaking stub presents itself."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":12152,"cache_read_input_tokens":41163,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":12152,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbmLJYZtnqusqDEBCwkMH","attributionAgent":"general-purpose","type":"assistant","uuid":"61ff939c-2123-4f33-a681-f1fb7ef6c338","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:56:56.286Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}

{"parentUuid":"c1e296d7-78ab-4d83-b59c-42698b349f21","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MTkKeuJbP7GevZswYH4zPm","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t// lib/features/exam_practice/pass/pass_meter_screen.dart\n2\t// A-KEN Quest — 合格メーター (Pass-Probability Readout Screen)\n3\t//\n4\t// Shows a child/parent:\n5\t//   • 予測合格率 NN% — how close to passing 英検 X級\n6\t//   • 合格まで あと N ポイント / 合格圏です — the gap in concrete CSE points\n7\t//   • Per-skill bars (Reading / Writing / Listening) with bilingual labels\n8\t//   • Weakest-skill call-to-action: \"リスニングを のばそう\"\n9\t//\n10\t// DESIGN CONTRACT:\n11\t//   • Reuses dq_ui.dart palette and components (DqScene, DqDialogBox, DqPanel,\n12\t//     DqButton, dqText, dqBilingual).\n13\t//   • Gentle, calm, ひらがな-friendly. No harsh red X. No grades below \"がんばれ!\".\n14\t//   • NO Firebase / network dependency in build or initState (R4).\n15\t//   • Data injected via constructor. Default [CseEstimate] demo profile works\n16\t//     immediately at ?preview (no dependency on real Firestore data).\n17\t//\n18\t// WIRING (to be done by the CEO — see REPORT section in task brief):\n19\t//   Add a route in app.dart, e.g.:\n20\t//     '/pass_meter': (context) {\n21\t//       final estimate = ModalRoute.of(context)!.settings.arguments as CseEstimate?;\n22\t//       return PassMeterScreen(estimate: estimate);\n23\t//     }\n24\t//   Trigger it from exam_practice_screen.dart after a session completes:\n25\t//     Navigator.pushNamed(context, '/pass_meter', arguments: myEstimate);\n26\t//\n27\t// NO dart:io. No Firebase. No network. (R4)\n28\t\n29\timport 'package:flutter/material.dart';\n30\timport 'package:google_fonts/google_fonts.dart';\n31\t\n32\timport '../../quest/ui/dq_ui.dart';\n33\timport 'cse_model.dart';\n34\t\n35\t// ── Demo profile (used when estimate is null, e.g. ?preview) ─────────────────\n36\t\n37\t/// A pre-built 英検2級 demo estimate for quick previewing without real data.\n38\t/// Readiness ~83%: Writing is the limiting skill (60% accuracy → weak spot).\n39\tfinal _kDemoEstimate = CseEstimator.estimate(\n40\t  grade: '2',\n41\t  accuracies: [\n42\t    const SkillAccuracy(\n43\t        skill: EikenSkill.reading, accuracy: 0.81, itemsAttempted: 31),\n44\t    const SkillAccuracy(\n45\t        skill: EikenSkill.writing, accuracy: 0.60, itemsAttempted: 2),\n46\t    const SkillAccuracy(\n47\t        skill: EikenSkill.listening, accuracy: 0.74, itemsAttempted: 30),\n48\t  ],\n49\t)!;\n50\t\n51\t// ── Screen ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n52\t\n53\tclass PassMeterScreen extends StatelessWidget {\n54\t  /// The CSE estimate to display. Defaults to [_kDemoEstimate] when null,\n55\t  /// so the screen is always renderable (R3/R4: no null crash, no Firebase).\n56\t  final CseEstimate? estimate;\n57\t\n58\t  const PassMeterScreen({super.key, this.estimate});\n59\t\n60\t  @override\n61\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n62\t    final est = estimate ?? _kDemoEstimate;\n63\t    final gradeLabel = _gradeLabelJa(est.grade);\n64\t\n65\t    return DqScene(\n66\t      child: SingleChildScrollView(\n67\t        padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20, 16, 20, 32),\n68\t        child: Column(\n69\t          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n70\t          children: [\n71\t            // ── Back button + title ──────────────────────────────────────────\n72\t            Row(\n73\t              children: [\n74\t                InkWell(\n75\t                  onTap: () => Navigator.maybePop(context),\n76\t                  child: const Padding(\n77\t                    padding: EdgeInsets.only(right: 12, top: 4, bottom: 4),\n78\t                    child: Icon(Icons.arrow_back, color: dqGold, size: 24),\n79\t                  ),\n80\t                ),\n81\t                Expanded(\n82\t                  child: dqBilingual(\n83\t                    '$gradeLabel 合格メーター',\n84\t                    'Pass Prediction',\n85\t                    jpSize: 18,\n86\t                    stacked: false,\n87\t                  ),\n88\t                ),\n89\t              ],\n90\t            ),\n91\t\n92\t            const SizedBox(height: 20),\n93\t\n94\t            // ── Hero meter ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n95\t            _PassHero(est: est),\n96\t\n97\t            const SizedBox(height: 20),\n98\t\n99\t            // ── Per-skill bars ───────────────────────────────────────────────\n100\t            DqPanel(\n101\t              title: 'ぎじゅつべつ / Skills',\n102\t              child: _SkillBars(est: est),\n103\t            ),\n104\t\n105\t            const SizedBox(height: 16),\n106\t\n107\t            // ── Weakest-skill CTA ────────────────────────────────────────────\n108\t            if (est.limitingSkill != null && !est.isPredictedPass)\n109\t              _WeakSkillCta(\n110\t                skill: est.limitingSkill!,\n111\t                gradeLabel: gradeLabel,\n112\t              ),\n113\t\n114\t            if (est.isPredictedPass) ...[\n115\t              const SizedBox(height: 8),\n116\t              _PassCelebration(gradeLabel: gradeLabel),\n117\t            ],\n118\t\n119\t            const SizedBox(height: 20),\n120\t\n121\t            // ── Motivational note ─────────────────────────────────────────────\n122\t            DqDialogBox(\n123\t              speaker: 'アドバイス',\n124\t              child: Text(\n125\t                _motivationalNote(est),\n126\t                style: dqText(size: 14),\n127\t              ),\n128\t            ),\n129\t\n130\t            const SizedBox(height: 20),\n131\t\n132\t            // ── Action button (placeholder — wired by CEO) ───────────────────\n133\t            DqButton(\n134\t              label: _ctaLabel(est),\n135\t              onTap: () => Navigator.maybePop(context),\n136\t            ),\n137\t          ],\n138\t        ),\n139\t      ),\n140\t    );\n141\t  }\n142\t}\n143\t\n144\t// ── Hero meter widget ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n145\t\n146\tclass _PassHero extends StatelessWidget {\n147\t  final CseEstimate est;\n148\t  const _PassHero({required this.est});\n149\t\n150\t  @override\n151\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n152\t    final pct = est.readinessPct;\n153\t    final gradeLabel = _gradeLabelJa(est.grade);\n154\t\n155\t    return DqPanel(\n156\t      child: Column(\n157\t        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.center,\n158\t        children: [\n159\t          const SizedBox(height: 4),\n160\t\n161\t          // Grade label\n162\t          Text(\n163\t            gradeLabel,\n164\t            textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n165\t            style: dqText(size: 15, color: dqGold),\n166\t          ),\n167\t\n168\t          const SizedBox(height: 8),\n169\t\n170\t          // Big percentage\n171\t          Text(\n172\t            '${pct.toStringAsFixed(0)}%',\n173\t            textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n174\t            style: GoogleFonts.notoSerifJp(\n175\t              color: _meterColor(pct),\n176\t              fontSize: 64,\n177\t              fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,\n178\t              shadows: const [\n179\t                Shadow(color: Colors.black, blurRadius: 8, offset: Offset(0, 3))\n180\t              ],\n181\t            ),\n182\t          ),\n183\t\n184\t          // Label under pct\n185\t          Text(\n186\t            'よそくごうかくりつ / Predicted readiness',\n187\t            textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n188\t            style: dqText(size: 12, color: dqGold),\n189\t          ),\n190\t\n191\t          const SizedBox(height: 12),\n192\t\n193\t          // Progress bar\n194\t          ClipRRect(\n195\t            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),\n196\t            child: LinearProgressIndicator(\n197\t              value: pct / 100.0,\n198\t              minHeight: 18,\n199\t              backgroundColor: const Color(0xFF1A2244),\n200\t              valueColor: AlwaysStoppedAnimation<Color>(_meterColor(pct)),\n201\t            ),\n202\t          ),\n203\t\n204\t          const SizedBox(height: 12),\n205\t\n206\t          // Points needed / pass message\n207\t          if (est.isPredictedPass)\n208\t            Text(\n209\t              'ごうかくけん！ / In passing zone',\n210\t              textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n211\t              style: dqText(size: 16, color: const Color(0xFF8BE08B)),\n212\t            )\n213\t          else\n214\t            Text(\n215\t              'ごうかくまで あと ${est.pointsNeeded} ポイント',\n216\t              textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n217\t              style: dqText(size: 16, color: dqInk),\n218\t            ),\n219\t\n220\t          const SizedBox(height: 4),\n221\t        ],\n222\t      ),\n223\t    );\n224\t  }\n225\t}\n226\t\n227\t// ── Per-skill bars ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n228\t\n229\tclass _SkillBars extends StatelessWidget {\n230\t  final CseEstimate est;\n231\t  const _SkillBars({required this.est});\n232\t\n233\t  @override\n234\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n235\t    final maxScores = CseEstimator.skillMaxScores(est.grade) ?? {};\n236\t    final skills = CseEstimator.skillsForGrade(est.grade) ?? [];\n237\t\n238\t    return Column(\n239\t      children: [\n240\t        for (final skill in skills) ...[\n241\t          _SkillBar(\n242\t            skill: skill,\n243\t            score: est.skillScores[skill] ?? 0,\n244\t            maxScore: maxScores[skill] ?? 1,\n245\t            isLimiting: est.limitingSkill == skill,\n246\t          ),\n247\t          const SizedBox(height: 10),\n248\t        ],\n249\t      ],\n250\t    );\n251\t  }\n252\t}\n253\t\n254\tclass _SkillBar extends StatelessWidget {\n255\t  final EikenSkill skill;\n256\t  final int score;\n257\t  final int maxScore;\n258\t  final bool isLimiting;\n259\t  const _SkillBar({\n260\t    required this.skill,\n261\t    required this.score,\n262\t    required this.maxScore,\n263\t    required this.isLimiting,\n264\t  });\n265\t\n266\t  @override\n267\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n268\t    final ratio = maxScore > 0 ? (score / maxScore).clamp(0.0, 1.0) : 0.0;\n269\t    final barColor = isLimiting ? const Color(0xFFE8B050) : const Color(0xFF6ABFEF);\n270\t    final pctText = '${(ratio * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%';\n271\t\n272\t    return Column(\n273\t      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n274\t      children: [\n275\t        Row(\n276\t          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,\n277\t          children: [\n278\t            Row(\n279\t              children: [\n280\t                if (isLimiting)\n281\t                  const Padding(\n282\t                    padding: EdgeInsets.only(right: 6),\n283\t                    child: Icon(Icons.warning_amber, color: dqGold, size: 16),\n284\t                  ),\n285\t                dqBilingual(\n286\t                  CseEstimator.skillLabelJa(skill),\n287\t                  CseEstimator.skillLabelEn(skill),\n288\t                  jpSize: 14,\n289\t                ),\n290\t              ],\n291\t            ),\n292\t            Text(\n293\t              '$score / $maxScore  ($pctText)',\n294\t              style: dqText(size: 13, color: dqGold),\n295\t            ),\n296\t          ],\n297\t        ),\n298\t        const SizedBox(height: 5),\n299\t        ClipRRect(\n300\t          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),\n301\t          child: LinearProgressIndicator(\n302\t            value: ratio,\n303\t            minHeight: 14,\n304\t            backgroundColor: const Color(0xFF1A2244),\n305\t            valueColor: AlwaysStoppedAnimation<Color>(barColor),\n306\t          ),\n307\t        ),\n308\t      ],\n309\t    );\n310\t  }\n311\t}\n312\t\n313\t// ── Weakest-skill CTA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n314\t\n315\tclass _WeakSkillCta extends StatelessWidget {\n316\t  final EikenSkill skill;\n317\t  final String gradeLabel;\n318\t  const _WeakSkillCta({required this.skill, required this.gradeLabel});\n319\t\n320\t  @override\n321\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n322\t    final labelJa = CseEstimator.skillLabelJa(skill);\n323\t    final labelEn = CseEstimator.skillLabelEn(skill);\n324\t\n325\t    return DqDialogBox(\n326\t      speaker: 'よわいぎじゅつ / Weak skill',\n327\t      child: Column(\n328\t        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,\n329\t        children: [\n330\t          Row(\n331\t            children: [\n332\t              const Icon(Icons.arrow_upward, color: dqGold, size: 20),\n333\t              const SizedBox(width: 8),\n334\t              Expanded(\n335\t                child: Text(\n336\t                  '$labelJaを のばそう！',\n337\t                  style: dqText(size: 17, color: dqGold),\n338\t                ),\n339\t              ),\n340\t            ],\n341\t          ),\n342\t          const SizedBox(height: 8),\n343\t          Text(\n344\t            '$labelJa ($labelEn) が $gradeLabel ごうかくの カギです。'\n345\t            'まいにち すこしずつ れんしゅうしよう！',\n346\t            style: dqText(size: 14),\n347\t          ),\n348\t        ],\n349\t      ),\n350\t    );\n351\t  }\n352\t}\n353\t\n354\t// ── Pass celebration ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n355\t\n356\tclass _PassCelebration extends StatelessWidget {\n357\t  final String gradeLabel;\n358\t  const _PassCelebration({required this.gradeLabel});\n359\t\n360\t  @override\n361\t  Widget build(BuildContext context) {\n362\t    return DqPanel(\n363\t      child: Column(\n364\t        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.center,\n365\t        children: [\n366\t          const Text('🎉', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 40)),\n367\t          const SizedBox(height: 8),\n368\t          Text(\n369\t            '$gradeLabel ごうかくけん！',\n370\t            textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n371\t            style: dqText(size: 20, color: const Color(0xFF8BE08B)),\n372\t          ),\n373\t          const SizedBox(height: 6),\n374\t          Text(\n375\t            'このままがんばれば ごうかくできそうです！\\n'\n376\t            'しけんびまで つづけよう。',\n377\t            textAlign: TextAlign.center,\n378\t            style: dqText(size: 14),\n379\t          ),\n380\t        ],\n381\t      ),\n382\t    );\n383\t  }\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t// ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n387\t\n388\tColor _meterColor(double pct) {\n389\t  if (pct >= 100) return const Color(0xFF8BE08B); // green — passing\n390\t  if (pct >= 80) return const Color(0xFFF0D080);  // gold — close\n391\t  if (pct >= 60) return const Color(0xFF6ABFEF);  // sky blue — building\n392\t  return const Color(0xFFEDE3C8);                  // cream — early stage\n393\t}\n394\t\n395\tString _gradeLabelJa(String grade) {\n396\t  switch (grade) {\n397\t    case '5':\n398\t      return '英けん5きゅう';\n399\t    case '4':\n400\t      return '英けん4きゅう';\n401\t    case '3':\n402\t      return '英けん3きゅう';\n403\t    case 'pre2':\n404\t      return '英けんじゅん2きゅう';\n405\t    case 'pre2plus':\n406\t      return '英けんじゅん2きゅうプラス';\n407\t    case '2':\n408\t      return '英けん2きゅう';\n409\t    case 'pre1':\n410\t      return '英けんじゅん1きゅう';\n411\t    default:\n412\t      return '英けん';\n413\t  }\n414\t}\n415\t\n416\tString _motivationalNote(CseEstimate est) {\n417\t  if (est.isPredictedPass) {\n418\t    return 'すばらしい！ ごうかくけんに はいっています。'\n419\t        'しけんびまで まいにちの れんしゅうを つづけて、'\n420\t        'じしんをもって うけましょう。';\n421\t  }\n422\t  final limitJa = est.limitingSkill != null\n423\t      ? CseEstimator.skillLabelJa(est.limitingSkill!)\n424\t      : 'れんしゅう';\n425\t  final needed = est.pointsNeeded;\n426\t  return '$limitJa を のばすと ごうかくに ちかづきます。'\n427\t      'あと $needed ポイント。まいにち すこしずつ れんしゅうすれば'\n428\t      'かならず とどきます！';\n429\t}\n430\t\n431\tString _ctaLabel(CseEstimate est) {\n432\t  return est.isPredictedPass ? 'もどる' : 'れんしゅうする';\n433\t}\n434\t"}]},"uuid":"7b3afe54-8d69-4870-9b78-3a829ae0366f","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:56:57.262Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"c1e296d7-78ab-4d83-b59c-42698b349f21","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}

{"parentUuid":"e2997507-6911-4ea8-98de-dbc8343c3e53","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01W6UG85DGJbgZ8Xt2AmabFC","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t// lib/features/speaking/pronunciation_scorer.dart\n2\t// A-KEN Quest — 英検 二次 Pronunciation Scorer interface + stub implementation.\n3\t//\n4\t// Architecture:\n5\t//   PronunciationScorer  — pure Dart interface; the real Azure Pronunciation\n6\t//                          Assessment implementation drops in here without any\n7\t//                          UI changes (strategy pattern).\n8\t//   StubPronunciationScorer — formative-feedback stub used until the Azure\n9\t//                             backend /v1/pronounce endpoint is wired (TODO).\n10\t//\n11\t// IMPORTANT:  Scores must NEVER be used as hard pass/fail verdicts.\n12\t// See ASR-SPEAKING-RESEARCH.json §biggestRisk: no published WER benchmark\n13\t// exists for Japanese children speaking L2 English; treat all output as\n14\t// FORMATIVE coaching only — encourage first, correct second.\n15\t//\n16\t// To wire Azure later:\n17\t//   1. Implement AzurePronunciationScorer : PronunciationScorer\n18\t//      — POST /v1/pronounce on the existing VPS proxy (Stripe+Claude server)\n19\t//      — pass audioBytes (16 kHz mono WAV) + referenceText + grade\n20\t//      — receive Azure structured JSON → Haiku rubric mapping.\n21\t//   2. Inject AzurePronunciationScorer into SpeakingScreen in exam_practice_screen.dart.\n22\t\n23\t/// A single scored item: the child spoke [referenceText] and got back\n24\t/// [feedback] with a [score] in [0.0, 1.0].\n25\tclass SpeakingScore {\n26\t  /// The text the child was asked to read or respond to.\n27\t  final String referenceText;\n28\t\n29\t  /// The transcript captured (may be empty if the child was silent).\n30\t  final String transcript;\n31\t\n32\t  /// Formative quality band in [0.0, 1.0].\n33\t  /// 0.0 = no speech detected, 1.0 = excellent.\n34\t  /// MUST be treated as coaching guidance, not a pass/fail threshold.\n35\t  final double score;\n36\t\n37\t  /// Child-friendly Japanese feedback sentence shown in the UI.\n38\t  final String feedbackJa;\n39\t\n40\t  /// Optional English coaching note (shown smaller, for older learners).\n41\t  final String feedbackEn;\n42\t\n43\t  /// Whether the アティチュード coach should be shown (silence detected).\n44\t  final bool showAttitudeCoach;\n45\t\n46\t  const SpeakingScore({\n47\t    required this.referenceText,\n48\t    required this.transcript,\n49\t    required this.score,\n50\t    required this.feedbackJa,\n51\t    required this.feedbackEn,\n52\t    this.showAttitudeCoach = false,\n53\t  });\n54\t}\n55\t\n56\t/// Interface for pronunciation/speaking scoring.\n57\t///\n58\t/// Implementations:\n59\t///   StubPronunciationScorer  — formative stub (current, no network)\n60\t///   AzurePronunciationScorer — TODO: real Azure via /v1/pronounce proxy\n61\tabstract class PronunciationScorer {\n62\t  /// Score the child's [transcript] against [referenceText] for [eikenGrade].\n63\t  ///\n64\t  /// [eikenGrade] is one of '3', 'pre2', '2', 'pre1' — used to adjust the\n65\t  /// scoring leniency (lower grades = more encouragement per Azure guidance).\n66\t  ///\n67\t  /// Returns a [SpeakingScore] with formative feedback.\n68\t  SpeakingScore score({\n69\t    required String referenceText,\n70\t    required String transcript,\n71\t    required String eikenGrade,\n72\t  });\n73\t}\n74\t\n75\t// ── Stub implementation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n76\t\n77\t/// Formative stub scorer.\n78\t///\n79\t/// STUB BEHAVIOUR (no network, no Azure):\n80\t///   - Empty transcript → score 0.0, アティチュード coach triggered.\n81\t///   - Very short transcript (< 3 words) → score 0.35, gentle retry.\n82\t///   - Transcript covers ≥ 50 % of reference words → score 0.75, encouragement.\n83\t///   - Otherwise → score 0.5, coaching.\n84\t///\n85\t/// All messages are intentionally positive/formative — the research finding is\n86\t/// that no JP-child benchmark exists, so we must bias lenient and never scold.\n87\t///\n88\t/// TODO: Replace with AzurePronunciationScorer once the Azure account and the\n89\t///       backend /v1/pronounce endpoint are set up.  The UI (SpeakingScreen)\n90\t///       calls only the interface and needs no changes.\n91\tclass StubPronunciationScorer implements PronunciationScorer {\n92\t  const StubPronunciationScorer();\n93\t\n94\t  @override\n95\t  SpeakingScore score({\n96\t    required String referenceText,\n97\t    required String transcript,\n98\t    required String eikenGrade,\n99\t  }) {\n100\t    final trimmed = transcript.trim();\n101\t\n102\t    // ── Silence / empty ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n103\t    if (trimmed.isEmpty) {\n104\t      return SpeakingScore(\n105\t        referenceText: referenceText,\n106\t        transcript: trimmed,\n107\t        score: 0.0,\n108\t        feedbackJa: 'もう少し、ゆっくり言ってみよう！',\n109\t        feedbackEn: 'Give it a try — any words are great!',\n110\t        showAttitudeCoach: true,\n111\t      );\n112\t    }\n113\t\n114\t    final transcriptWords =\n115\t        trimmed.toLowerCase().split(RegExp(r'\\s+')).where((w) => w.isNotEmpty).toList();\n116\t    final referenceWords =\n117\t        referenceText.toLowerCase().split(RegExp(r'\\s+')).where((w) => w.isNotEmpty).toList();\n118\t\n119\t    // ── Very short response ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n120\t    if (transcriptWords.length < 3) {\n121\t      return SpeakingScore(\n122\t        referenceText: referenceText,\n123\t        transcript: trimmed,\n124\t        score: 0.35,\n125\t        feedbackJa: 'いいね！もう少し続けて言ってみよう。',\n126\t        feedbackEn: 'Good start! Try to say a bit more.',\n127\t        showAttitudeCoach: false,\n128\t      );\n129\t    }\n130\t\n131\t    // ── Coverage heuristic ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n132\t    // Count how many distinct reference words appear in the transcript.\n133\t    final refSet = referenceWords.toSet();\n134\t    final transcriptSet = transcriptWords.toSet();\n135\t    final overlap = refSet.intersection(transcriptSet).length;\n136\t    final coverage = referenceWords.isEmpty ? 0.0 : overlap / referenceWords.length;\n137\t\n138\t    if (coverage >= 0.5) {\n139\t      return SpeakingScore(\n140\t        referenceText: referenceText,\n141\t        transcript: trimmed,\n142\t        score: 0.75,\n143\t        feedbackJa: 'よくできました！自信を持って話せているね。',\n144\t        feedbackEn: 'Well done! You covered the key words.',\n145\t        showAttitudeCoach: false,\n146\t      );\n147\t    }\n148\t\n149\t    // ── Partial coverage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n150\t    return SpeakingScore(\n151\t      referenceText: referenceText,\n152\t      transcript: trimmed,\n153\t      score: 0.5,\n154\t      feedbackJa: 'がんばった！もう少し練習するともっとうまくなるよ。',\n155\t      feedbackEn: 'Good effort! Practice makes perfect.',\n156\t      showAttitudeCoach: false,\n157\t    );\n158\t  }\n159\t}\n160\t"}]},"uuid":"1ca4256b-0377-4db9-bedb-6474331a0d1a","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:56:57.572Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"e2997507-6911-4ea8-98de-dbc8343c3e53","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}

{"parentUuid":"edb28703-ec92-4b05-9ac3-daca5cb7c985","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014EgZKq5dd4zGzVF56DNgBx","type":"tool_result","content":"108\t/// Background + NPC art is generated separately via scripts/safe-job.sh.\n109\t/// Image.asset in SceneView uses errorBuilder → dq night-gradient fallback\n110\t/// so the scene renders gracefully before art exists.\n111\tfinal SceneDef kTown5Scene = SceneDef(\n112\t  backgroundAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/town5_lane.png',\n113\t  // Single painted plate for now (parallax drifts the whole plate); sliced\n114\t  // far/mid/near bands are a later generation pass.\n115\t  parallaxLayers: const [],\n116\t  titleJa: 'ことばを失（うしな）った村（むら）',\n117\t  hotspots: [\n118\t    // ── NPC 1: 時計職人（灰守セル） — the /s/ phoneme phonics step ────────────\n119\t    // Encounter index 0 from kQuestTowns[0].encounters (TeachSound /s/).\n120\t    // The framing re-casts the phonics ナゾ as a mystery beat.\n121\t    Hotspot.npc(\n122\t      pos: const Alignment(-0.45, 0.10),\n123\t      size: 0.20,\n124\t      step: _kStep(0),\n125\t      clueLineJa: '「あの時計（とけい）、ずっと止（と）まったまま……'\n126\t          'もしかして、なにかの音（おと）がいるのかな？」',\n127\t      framingJa: 'この時計台（とけいだい）、サイレントが来（き）てから動（うご）かなくなった。'\n128\t          '「ssss…」——ヘビのように ながく のばす音（おと）が 聞（き）こえる？',\n129\t      npcGreyAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/npc_clockmaker_grey.png',\n130\t      npcColorAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/npc_clockmaker_color.png',\n131\t    ),\n132\t    // ── NPC 2: スラ（小スライム） — the first greeting QuestEncounter ─────────\n133\t    // Encounter index 12 = first QuestEncounter (「Hello!」greeting).\n134\t    // framingJa sets up the silent-slime story beat.\n135\t    Hotspot.npc(\n136\t      pos: const Alignment(0.30, 0.30),\n137\t      size: 0.16,\n138\t      step: _kStep(12),\n139\t      clueLineJa: 'ちいさなスライムが口（くち）をひらく……でも、なんにも出（で）てこない。',\n140\t      framingJa: 'このスライム、ずっと ことばを さがしてる。'\n141\t          'あいさつの ことばを おしえてあげよう！',\n142\t      npcGreyAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/npc_slime_grey.png',\n143\t      npcColorAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/npc_slime_color.png',\n144\t    ),\n145\t    // ── NPC 3: 門番（もんばん） — be動詞 are (Quiz, cloze) ────────────────────\n146\t    // Encounter index 15 = be動詞 人称一致「You ___ a traveller.」cloze.\n147\t    Hotspot.npc(\n148\t      pos: const Alignment(0.68, -0.20),\n149\t      size: 0.17,\n150\t      step: _kStep(15),\n151\t      clueLineJa: '「ここを通（とお）りたいなら……正（ただ）しい言葉（ことば）で答（こた）えてみよ！」',\n152\t      framingJa: '村（むら）の門（もん）。門番（もんばん）が立（た）ちはだかる。'\n153\t          '正（ただ）しい形（かたち）の動詞（どうし）を選（えら）べ。',\n154\t      npcGreyAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/npc_gatekeeper_grey.png',\n155\t      npcColorAsset: 'assets/art/scenes_layton/npc_gatekeeper_color.png',\n156\t    ),\n157\t    // ── Coin: hidden on the lamppost ────────────────────────────────────────\n158\t    Hotspot.coin(\n159\t      pos: const Alignment(-0.75, -0.35),\n160\t      size: 0.11,\n161\t      coinValue: 1,\n162\t      clueLineJa: 'スラ：「光（ひかり）がどこかに……ランプの近（ちか）くかな？」',\n163\t    ),\n164\t  ],\n165\t);\n166\t\n167\t/// Helper: look up encounter [i] from kQuestTowns[0] at const-eval time.\n168\t/// Using a top-level function keeps the SceneDef final initialiser clean while\n169\t/// confirming the index is valid. Throws at startup (not runtime) if the town\n170\t/// changes structure — an intentional safety trip.\n171\tQuestStep _kStep(int i) => kQuestTowns[0].encounters[i];\n172\t"}]},"uuid":"3283ab5e-0ca0-4e59-963d-10378050a239","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:57:20.312Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"edb28703-ec92-4b05-9ac3-daca5cb7c985","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}

So `explore.png` (the blank one with default blue-person icons and the small clockmaker portrait) is a STALE/older build screenshot — likely from before the art was generated, OR it's the desktop/wide-render where the background failed to load. `explore_final.png` is the real current state. Note the NPC portraits in explore_final.png show the **grey (unsolved) state** correctly. \n\nOne important detail: in explore.png, two hotspots render as **blue default-person icons (`👤` fallback or Flutter's broken-image)** while one shows the clockmaker portrait. That suggests in some build, only `town5_lane` and clockmaker loaded. But explore_final shows all NPCs as painted circular portraits. This is a parallax/asset-load timing seam worth flagging but not critical.\n\nLet me verify two more claims: (1) the FSRS \"館\" read-back — is it actually wired into a daily-return loop, or just claimed? (2) the placement→explore→exam flow — do these connect? {"parentUuid":"d7382a8c-8a6d-45a7-bd94-a78fcb697df2","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014mTFF8wFAK4X27ec6cierR","type":"tool_result","content":"8:import 'package:engquest/features/onboarding/onboarding_flow.dart';\n36:  static const _kComplete = 'onboarding_complete';\n37:  static const _kAge = 'onboarding_age';\n38:  // _kCefr was used by the old 3-level placement — no longer written on new\n42:  static const _kCefr = 'onboarding_cefr';\n43:  static const _kAvatar = 'onboarding_avatar';\n44:  static const _kGoal = 'onboarding_goal_minutes';\n46:  static const _kStartLevel = 'onboarding_start_level'; // new: persists英検 level\n47:  static const _kPlacementTheta = 'onboarding_placement_theta'; // T12 hook\n68:  /// Returns true if onboarding has been completed.\n115:        _kPlacementTheta, result.placementTheta.toString());\n126:      placementGrade: 0, // not stored separately; theta is the T12 signal\n127:      placementTheta: theta,\n176:      // Entry point: check onboarding flag and route accordingly.\n177:      // ?preview=<name> renders a single screen for design audit/screenshots.\n178:      home: _previewFor(Uri.base.queryParameters['preview']),\n271:// App entry point — onboarding gate\n278:/// On onboarding completion, [OnboardingResult] is persisted via\n280:/// Design-audit harness: `?preview=<name>` renders one screen in isolation so\n282:Widget _previewFor(String? name) {\n284:    case 'title':\n285:      return QuestTitleScreen(onStart: () {});\n286:    case 'onboarding':\n288:    case 'placement':\n290:      // placement step (age pre-set to 13 so the engine seeds at 準2級).\n292:    case 'worldmap':\n293:      return const WorldMapScreen(childAge: 8);\n294:    case 'home':\n295:      return const DailyHomeScreen(childAge: 8);\n296:    case 'questmap':\n297:      return const QuestMapScreen();\n298:    case 'silentbattle': // Wave 1 — サイレント word-battle (skip intro, open in battle)\n299:      return QuestTownBattleFlow(town: kQuestTowns[0], previewStraightToBattle: true);\n300:    case 'silentbattle4':\n301:      return QuestTownBattleFlow(town: kQuestTowns[1], previewStraightToBattle: true);\n302:    case 'prologue':\n303:      return PrologueScreen(onDone: () {});\n304:    case 'prologue3':\n305:      return PrologueScreen(onDone: () {}, startIndex: 3);\n306:    case 'prologue4':\n307:      return PrologueScreen(onDone: () {}, startIndex: 4);\n308:    case 'prologue5':\n309:      return PrologueScreen(onDone: () {}, startIndex: 5);\n310:    case 'explore':\n312:      return SceneView(scene: kTown5Scene, eikenLevel: '5');\n313:    case 'quest':\n314:      return QuestScreen(town: kQuestTowns.first);\n315:    case 'quest5t': // 英検5級 Phase A — first TeachSound (/s/) step\n316:      return QuestScreen(town: kQuestTowns[0], previewEncounterIndex: 0);\n317:    case 'quest5':","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"e1822fbb-7cdc-4950-bd2b-f7c953e9c3f4","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:57:33.512Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"d7382a8c-8a6d-45a7-bd94-a78fcb697df2","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}

Deep-night scaffold, gold/cream\n199\t/// ColorScheme, serif (Noto Serif JP) typography rendered in cream ink, dark\n200\t/// app bars and cards. Replaces the former bright pastel ThemeData. Individual\n201\t/// quest scenes still compose [DqScene]/[DqDialogBox]/etc. for full atmosphere;\n202\t/// this theme governs default Material chrome (dialogs, app bars, snackbars).\n203\tThemeData _dqTheme() {\n204\t  const scheme = ColorScheme.dark(\n205\t    primary: dqGold,\n206\t    onPrimary: Color(0xFF2A1C00), // dark ink on gold buttons\n207\t    secondary: dqGold,\n208\t    onSecondary: Color(0xFF2A1C00),\n209\t    surface: dqBox, // navy command-window fill\n210\t    onSurface: dqInk, // cream ink\n211\t    surfaceContainerHighest: dqNight1,\n212\t    error: Color(0xFFE89090),\n213\t    onError: Color(0xFF2A1C00),\n214\t    outline: dqGoldDeep,\n215\t  );\n216\t\n217\t  // Noto Serif JP applied over the dark base text theme, recoloured to cream\n218\t  // ink so default Material text (dialogs, tooltips) reads on the night field.\n219\t  final base = ThemeData.dark(useMaterial3: true);\n220\t  final textTheme = GoogleFonts.notoSerifJpTextTheme(base.textTheme).apply(\n221\t    bodyColor: dqInk,\n222\t    displayColor: dqInk,\n223\t  );\n224\t\n225\t  return ThemeData(\n226\t    useMaterial3: true,\n227\t    brightness: Brightness.dark,\n228\t    colorScheme: scheme,\n229\t    scaffoldBackgroundColor: dqNight0,\n230\t    canvasColor: dqNight0,\n231\t    textTheme: textTheme,\n232\t    appBarTheme: const AppBarTheme(\n233\t      backgroundColor: dqNight1,\n234\t      foregroundColor: dqInk,\n235\t      elevation: 0,\n236\t      centerTitle: true,\n237\t    ),\n238\t    cardTheme: CardThemeData(\n239\t      color: dqBox,\n240\t      elevation: 2,\n241\t      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(\n242\t        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),\n243\t        side: const BorderSide(color: dqBorder, width: 1.5),\n244\t      ),\n245\t    ),\n246\t    dialogTheme: DialogThemeData(\n247\t      backgroundColor: dqBox,\n248\t      surfaceTintColor: Colors.transparent,\n249\t      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(\n250\t        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),\n251\t        side: const BorderSide(color: dqBorder, width: 2),\n252\t      ),\n253\t    ),\n254\t    iconTheme: const IconThemeData(color: dqGold),\n255\t    progressIndicatorTheme: const ProgressIndicatorThemeData(color: dqGold),\n256\t    dividerTheme: const DividerThemeData(color: dqGoldDeep, thickness: 1),\n257\t    elevatedButtonTheme: ElevatedButtonThemeData(\n258\t      style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(\n259\t        backgroundColor: dqGold,\n260\t        foregroundColor: const Color(0xFF2A1C00),\n261\t        shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(\n262\t          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),\n263\t          side: const BorderSide(color: dqBorder, width: 1.5),\n264\t        ),\n265\t      ),\n266\t (DailyHomeScreen stays a retention hub for\n\n=== FSRS due/review surfaced as 今日のナゾ anywhere? ===\nlib/features/battle/battle_screen.dart:271:    final dueCards = await _repository.getDueCards(uid, now);\nlib/features/battle/battle_screen.dart:272:    final dueIds = dueCards.map((c) => c.vocabId).toSet();\n\n=== price ===\nlib/core/config/flavor_config.dart:5://   - Flavor.aken   — commercial freemium (¥999/month via Stripe).\nlib/core/config/flavor_config.dart:20:  /// Grade 5 is free; all other grades require ¥999/month Stripe subscription.\nlib/core/config/flavor_config.dart:121:          // Grade 5 is free; all others require ¥999/month subscription.\nlib/core/gamification/xp_profile.dart:50:/// Returns 9999 if already at max defined level.\nlib/core/gamification/xp_profile.dart:52:  if (level >= kMaxDefinedLevel) return 9999;\nlib/core/gamification/xp_profile.dart:65:  if (level >= kMaxDefinedLevel) return 9999;\nlib/core/gamification/xp_profile.dart:105:    if (levelXpSpan == 0 || levelXpSpan == 9999) return 0.0;\nlib/core/fsrs/fsrs_algorithm.dart:91:    final rClamped = r.clamp(0.0, 0.999); // avoid exp((1-1)*w10)-1 = 0\nlib/core/billing/billing_service.dart:16://   - active: paid ¥999/month (all grades unlocked)\nlib/features/legal/terms_of_service_screen.dart:92:              '• A-KEN Quest版：月額999円（税込）',","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"35f8dfd1-e9fe-409b-aede-af0a91916a63","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:57:57.825Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"92983673-beef-41fb-ac55-99c5836fda30","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
{"parentUuid":"35f8dfd1-e9fe-409b-aede-af0a91916a63","isSidechain":true,"agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_0156qgxB3YbuZAYqq2gZhZKG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"All confirmed. The evidence is solid. Summary of confirmed findings:\n\n1. **Retention spine (strategy doc's #1/#2/#3 highest-ROI levers) is NOT wired into the live flow.** `StreakService` exists but only the retired `silent_battle_screen` + `daily_home_screen` use it. `DailyHomeScreen` is `?preview`-only. No 今日のナゾ surfaces FSRS-due reviews — the only `getDueCards` call is in the retired `battle_screen`. The async Duolingo engine the whole strategy hinges on is unbuilt as a loop.\n\n2. **The コトバ探偵 explore scene is NOT the home experience** — it's buried behind the legacy `WorldMapScreen → QuestMapScreen`. The premium Layton soul isn't what a child lands on.\n\n3. **合格率 meter is live with hardcoded 2級 demo data** (`const PassMeterScreen()` → `_kDemoEstimate`), and the math (`total/passing`) can show 100%/合格 while Writing is only 60% — contradicting its own \"one weak skill fails you\" spec.\n\n4. **二次 speaking stub scores text-overlap, not pronunciation** — for 音読 the child reads the on-screen passage so coverage ≈ high → 0.75 regardless of how they sound. Honestly labeled 【開発中】 though.\n\n5. Price discrepancy ¥999 (4 code locations incl. ToS) vs ¥1,480 strategy — unreconciled.\n\n6. `explore.png` (blank) vs `explore_final.png` (painted) is a stale screenshot; assets exist and are bundled.\n\nLet me load the structured output schema if one is expected, then deliver."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1567,"cache_read_input_tokens":74408,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1567,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbmLPVF6xAerRyd1jEZXR","attributionAgent":"general-purpose","type":"assistant","uuid":"297ebff3-377b-4481-8254-63a519eb5fd8","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:58:08.328Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
