{"parentUuid":"3951c916-b26e-496d-8895-1d047224cef5","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"41835ea0-fdd5-4fca-9a4b-027790a38dd2","agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"tool_result","tool_use_id":"toolu_01HkvaL4fj6y4TmDtQtzFbec","content":"No matching deferred tools found"}]},"uuid":"86e55d18-5254-4c80-9b28-2fc44bafbaca","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:58:08.653Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"3951c916-b26e-496d-8895-1d047224cef5","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
{"parentUuid":"86e55d18-5254-4c80-9b28-2fc44bafbaca","isSidechain":true,"agentId":"afebc93abf2a36b6d","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01AUbxGoLdGmUeCjfHbw3bHn","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"No StructuredOutput tool exists — I'll return the prioritized list directly as my final message.\n\n---\n\n# OPUS 最高責任者 Review — A-KEN Quest (R8 Intervention, 2026-06-06)\n\n**Method:** Read the dossier + constitution + strategy doc; inspected `scene_view.dart`, `cse_model.dart`, `pass_meter_screen.dart`, `pronunciation_scorer.dart`, `app.dart`, `world_map_screen.dart`, `quest_map_screen.dart`, `flavor_config.dart`; ran `verify_quality.sh --fast` (PASS, R3 warn-only); viewed all 7 screenshots. Findings separated: **[FACT]** = verified in code/screen, **[ASSUMPTION]**, **[REC]**.\n\n---\n\n## Prioritized corrections & pivots\n\n### 1. CRITICAL — The retention spine (the entire business model) is not built as a loop\n- **Area:** core loop / strategy\n- **Problem [FACT]:** The locked strategy (STRATEGY-LAYTON-VS-HYBRID) names the **streak → daily FSRS ナゾ → parent readiness** loop as levers #1/#2/#3 — \"the one feature with highest leverage,\" \"retention literally IS the business\" for a ¥1,480 sub. It does not exist as a wired loop. `StreakService` is referenced only by the **retired** `silent_battle_screen.dart` and by `daily_home_screen.dart`, which is reachable **only via `?preview=home`** (`app.dart:295`). The only FSRS `getDueCards()` call lives in the **retired** `battle_screen.dart:271`. There is no 今日のナゾ surfacing due reviews anywhere in the live flow. After onboarding the app lands on `WorldMapScreen` (`app.dart:188`), a legacy DQ hub — not a daily-return home.\n- **Fix [REC]:** Build the day-2 loop before anything else: a landing home that (a) shows the streak as a 探偵's case-log (diegetic, per biggestRisk), (b) surfaces FSRS-due items as 「館に新しいナゾが届いた」, (c) routes into a コトバ探偵 scene. Wire `StreakService` + FSRS `getDueCards` into it. This is the renewal trigger; without it the product is a finite demo.\n- **Effort:** L (the pieces exist — StreakService, FSRS engine, DailyHomeScreen shell — but integration + the \"today's review = a ナゾ\" mapping is real work).\n\n### 2. CRITICAL — The コトバ探偵 soul is buried; the product's first impression is a legacy world map\n- **Area:** coherence / soul\n- **Problem [FACT]:** `SceneView` (the painted Layton scene, the differentiation) is reachable only via `?preview=explore` or two taps deep: `WorldMapScreen → QuestMapScreen → SceneView` (`quest_map_screen.dart:83`). The child's actual landing screen is the old `WorldMapScreen`. The premium-calm Layton immersion the strategy says \"IS the product\" is not what anyone sees first.\n- **Fix [REC]:** Make コトバ探偵 (or the new daily-home that opens into it) the post-onboarding landing. Retire `WorldMapScreen` from the main path. The placement → explore → exam pieces are individually decent but do NOT yet form one converging product — they're parallel screens stitched by a legacy hub.\n- **Effort:** M.\n\n### 3. CRITICAL — 合格率 meter ships hardcoded demo data AND its math can lie about passing\n- **Area:** evidence / R1-spirit / parent-trust\n- **Problem [FACT]:** Live wiring is `const PassMeterScreen()` (`app.dart:444`) → null estimate → `_kDemoEstimate` (a fixed 英検2級 profile, `pass_meter_screen.dart:39`). The \"100% / 合格けん\" the CEO saw in `passmeter.png` is **not the child's performance** — it's a constant. Worse, the readiness formula is `totalScore / passingScore` (`cse_model.dart:234`), which **aggregates skills**. The model's own header states the 2024 reform rule: \"One weak skill fails you even if others are perfect.\" The screenshot shows Writing at 60% yet the meter declares 合格圏 100% — the aggregate hides exactly the per-skill failure the real exam enforces. A parent paying for \"reliably passes 英検\" is being shown a false green light.\n- **Fix [REC]:** (a) Feed real per-skill accuracy from session history, never a const demo, in the live build. (b) Gate `isPredictedPass` on **every** skill clearing a per-skill floor (英検 also has CSE-per-skill minimums post-reform), not just the sum. A child weak in one skill must not see 合格. This is the sole-KPI integrity check.\n- **Effort:** M (per-skill floor + real data plumbing).\n\n### 4. HIGH — 二次 stub scores text-overlap, not pronunciation (risk of false competence signal)\n- **Area:** soul / honesty / R6\n- **Problem [FACT]:** `StubPronunciationScorer` (`pronunciation_scorer.dart:131`) scores by counting reference-word overlap in the transcript. For 音読/Read Aloud (`speaking.png`), the child reads the on-screen passage, so coverage is trivially ≥0.5 → score 0.75 \"よくできました\" **regardless of actual pronunciation**. It measures \"did the ASR transcribe the words shown on screen,\" not speaking quality. **Honest part [FACT]:** the screen carries a visible 【開発中】 / 音読 stub notice — that disclosure is good and R9-compliant for now.\n- **Fix [REC]:** Keep the stub honest (it is), but do NOT let its 0.75 feed the 合格率 meter or any \"readiness\" claim. Until Azure is wired, exclude Speaking from pass prediction entirely rather than inflate it. Flag the no-JP-child-benchmark calibration risk (dossier §8) as a beta-only item.\n- **Effort:** S (gate the stub out of scoring) / L (real Azure).\n\n### 5. HIGH — Backend not deployed makes the two pass-critical skills non-functional live\n- **Area:** critical path to sellable\n- **Problem [FACT, per dossier §6]:** `backend/server.js` is not deployed; no engquest node process on the VPS. Live Writing falls back to its self-check checklist (no AI grade), `/v1/pronounce` has no host, Stripe is unreachable, subs are an in-memory Map. Demo is HTTP-only on `:8088`, no domain/HTTPS. Writing + Speaking are 2 of the 3-4 英検 skills; AI grading is the product's claim. Without the backend, the \"passes 英検\" promise is unbacked on the live build.\n- **Fix [REC] — true critical path to a sellable product, ranked:** (1) Deploy backend (systemd/pm2 + Claude/Stripe keys) so Writing grading works live. (2) Domain + HTTPS (required for COPPA voice + Stripe + trust). (3) **保護者同意 consent gate** before any cloud voice — hard launch blocker (COPPA-2025). (4) Persist subscriptions in a real DB (Firestore), kill the in-memory Map. (5) Wire the retention loop (#1) + real pass-meter data (#3). (6) Scale item banks beyond demo size. Only after 1-5 is it sellable.\n- **Effort:** L overall (1-2 are ops; 3 is small build; 4 small).\n\n### 6. MEDIUM — Price discrepancy ¥999 vs ¥1,480 is shipped to users\n- **Area:** strategy / legal\n- **Problem [FACT]:** Strategy says ¥1,480/mo. Code still says ¥999 in `flavor_config.dart` (lines 5, 20, 121), `billing_service.dart:16`, and **in the Terms of Service shown to users** (`terms_of_service_screen.dart:92` — 「月額999円（税込）」). A live ToS quoting the wrong price is a consumer-law exposure in Japan.\n- **Fix [REC]:** Reconcile to one number across config, billing, Stripe price ID, and ToS. Decision needed from CEO; then a global sweep (constitution R5 leakage-grep style).\n- **Effort:** S.\n\n### 7. MEDIUM — Asset-load seam in the explore scene (cosmetic but on the hero screen)\n- **Area:** R2/R3 render proof\n- **Problem [FACT]:** `explore.png` renders the scene blank (night gradient + blue default-person fallbacks + one stray portrait) while `explore_final.png` renders the full painted plate. All 7 `scenes_layton/*.png` exist and are declared in `pubspec.yaml` — so `explore.png` is a **stale pre-art screenshot**, not a current bug. **However [ASSUMPTION]:** the `errorBuilder → gradient/👤 fallback` in `scene_view.dart:266,409` is exactly the \"silent fallback masks a missing asset\" pattern R2 forbids on the hero screen. If a single NPC plate fails to bundle in a prod build, the child sees a blue default-person icon mid-scene with no error.\n- **Fix [REC]:** Add the scenes_layton plates to the R2 asset-contract check (or ALLOWED_MISSING with a dated reason), and capture a fresh `?preview=explore` screenshot post-build so the dossier's current-state evidence isn't a stale PNG.\n- **Effort:** S.\n\n### Not violations (verified clean)\n- **R9 gacha/paywall/AI-slop [FACT]:** No gacha, energy, PvP, or buyable currency found. HintCoin is earned-only. Art is one cohesive painted style. Compliant.\n- **R5 narrative leakage [FACT]:** gate PASS — zero 魔王/王子 residue.\n- **Quality gate [FACT]:** `verify_quality.sh --fast` exits 0 (R3 smoke tests warn-only, 17 screens uncovered — a real but non-blocking backlog).\n\n---\n\n## Honest verdict\n\nThe current trajectory does **not** yet reach a sellable 英検-pass product, and the gap is structural, not cosmetic. The team has built a strong inventory of *screens* — a genuinely premium painted explore scene, a placement diagnostic, writing/listening engines, a pass meter, a 二次 scaffold — but they do not yet form **one product**: the differentiating コトバ探偵 soul is buried behind a legacy world map, the retention loop that *is* the subscription business (streak → daily FSRS ナゾ → parent readiness) exists only as orphaned services and preview-only screens, the backend that makes Writing/Speaking actually graded isn't deployed, and the one screen a parent reads as proof-of-value — the 合格率 meter — currently shows hardcoded demo data and uses math that can flash \"合格\" while a skill is failing. None of these is hard to fix; collectively they mean today's build is a high-quality **vertical-slice demo**, not a product. The good news: the strategy is right, the assets are real, and the soul is visibly there in `explore_final.png`.\n\n**Single most important next action:** Wire the post-onboarding **daily-return loop** — land the child on a コトバ探偵/case-log home that surfaces FSRS-due items as 今日のナゾ and routes into the painted scene — because it simultaneously fixes the buried-soul seam (#2), makes the product a returning habit (#1), and is the only thing that turns a finite demo into a subscription. Everything else (backend deploy, real pass-meter data, price fix) is necessary plumbing; this is the spine."}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":675,"cache_read_input_tokens":75975,"output_tokens":4046,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":675},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":4046,"cache_read_input_tokens":75975,"cache_creation_input_tokens":675,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":675,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbmLQHt1tEQEaJz6ZPqqu","attributionAgent":"general-purpose","type":"assistant","uuid":"dae0884b-3047-4e87-ae54-dab3fb08a8c7","timestamp":"2026-06-06T03:59:05.601Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/openclaw/dev/engquest-flutter","sessionId":"e910f43e-613f-4c08-8b89-90096f72c933","version":"2.1.154","gitBranch":"main","slug":"reflective-gliding-newell"}
